message:
refactor(core): track pane activity by cursor progress instead of discovery heartbeats

Extract duplicated health snapshot building logic into
build_health_pane_snapshot() which uses cursor sequence comparison
to detect real output progress, fixing false "stuck pane" reports
caused by discovery heartbeats resetting activity timestamps.

Introduce PaneActivityState and HealthPaneSnapshot structs. Change
fleet_pane_infos_from_registry() to use cursor.next_seq as the
activity counter and report warm_bytes/warm_pages as zero since the
runtime does not hold live TieredScrollback instances.

DRY-refactor crash bundle writing with a maybe_write_bounded closure
that correctly skips oversized optional files without consuming budget.
Add 5 new tests covering activity tracking, closed pane cleanup,
fleet info defaults, and crash budget handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
